title: Sunday Green Curry
description: A creamy and aromatic green curry made with fresh green and cardamom, perfect for a lazy Sunday.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the green curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the green and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Add the fish balls and cook until heated through.
Add the cardamom, sugar, and salt, and stir to combine.
Add water as needed to achieve the desired consistency.
Simmer the curry sauce for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with fresh green and cardamom, if desired.
